# daytona_admin_webhook_message_attempts (Data Source)

Reads Daytona admin webhook delivery attempts for a message. This data source requires Daytona admin privileges.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "daytona_admin_webhook_message_attempts" "example" {
  organization_id = "organization-id"
  message_id      = "message-id"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `message_id` (String) Daytona webhook message ID.
- `organization_id` (String) Daytona organization ID that owns the webhook message.

### Read-Only

- `attempts_json` (String, Sensitive) Webhook delivery attempts as JSON.
- `id` (String) Data source identifier.
